safety_attestations: This fixture intentionally mentions auth_state and a session cookie so validation rejects private artifacts.
This fixture intentionally mentions a screenshot, Playwright trace, and HAR file so validation rejects capture claims.
This fixture intentionally says it logged into DevHub and observed live DevHub so validation rejects live interaction claims.
This fixture intentionally says it updated active surface map so validation rejects active mutation claims.
This fixture intentionally says it filled form fields and uploaded documents so validation rejects form-fill and upload claims.
This fixture intentionally says it submitted permit, paid fee, and scheduled inspection so validation rejects official-action claims.
This fixture intentionally says permit will be approved and legally sufficient so validation rejects legal or permitting guarantees.
